title: Onboarding - Check onboarding screens UI
scenario: Onboarding screens UI verification for Organized, Up-to-Date, and Personal pages in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Progress through the onboarding screens until reaching the "Organized" screen.
3. Verify the UI elements on the "Organized" screen (e.g., title, description text, illustration, navigation dots, Next/Get Started button).
4. Swipe left to navigate to the next onboarding page ("Up-to-Date").
5. Verify the UI elements on the "Up-to-Date" screen (e.g., title, description text, illustration, navigation dots, Next/Get Started button).
6. Swipe left to navigate to the next onboarding page ("Personal").
7. Verify the UI elements on the "Personal" screen (e.g., title, description text, illustration, navigation dots, Get Started button).
expected: All onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal) display correctly with proper title, description, illustration, navigation dots, and functional Next/Get Started button. No UI clipping, misalignment, or text truncation.
